name: Knowledge Wiki Plugin
description: Karpathy-style LLM Wiki + arscontexta-style context engine bundled as a single plugin. Gives the operator /ingest, /query, /lint, /ralph, and /plan commands, backed by a Markdown vault that any AI (Claude, Gemini, local Qwen) can read — no vendor lock-in.
use_cases: Building a personal research vault from Web Clipper / YouTube transcripts / PDFs
Answering questions with citations without a vector DB or paid RAG service
Keeping multiple AI tools in sync by pointing them at the same Markdown vault
Daily /ralph run to sweep Inbox/ into atoms, refresh links, and log a session report

capabilities.ingest: Compile a raw source (file, URL, paste) into atomic wiki pages with wikilinks
capabilities.query: Answer a question from the wiki, optionally saving the Q&A as a new concept page
capabilities.lint: Broken-link / duplicate-title / empty-page / missing-backlink health check
capabilities.ralph: Run the full Record → Reduce → Reflect → Retrieve → Verify → Resync pipeline
capabilities.plan: Propose a plan for a goal without executing (plan mode)

integration.obsidian: Vault layout is Obsidian-compatible — open the same folder as a Vault.
integration.approval_gate: `--save` and `--fix` paths are gated when they would touch shared vaults.
integration.sandbox: All vault paths are registered with filesystem_sandbox before writing.
integration.prompt_guard: Ingested content goes through wrap_external_data and PII masking.

note: Works fully offline. No LLM API call is made in the default extractor — users can override the _compile_atomic_pages / _synthesize_answer hooks to plug in a provider.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
